violations.text: Several items such as, parfaits, chicken wraps, breakfast sandwiches, cookies, pound cake, etc. packaged in the food establishment are lacking adequate labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food was moved behind counter at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

Several grab and go items, including egg sandwiches, tuna salad, tuna sandwiches, lemon cake, and other items packaged in the food establishment are lacking allergen declarations on their labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. The code also states that the name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD shall be included on the label unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2024

Working containers of tree nuts, dried fruit are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2024

An employee's personal electronic device was observed stored in the counter area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
